SBC Inspection Report

2.0 Violation Details

MEDIUM VIO-001 SBC Ref: 41-3.3.4

Visible flexible cable/cord run without concealed sections in damage-prone areas

Description Large coiled electrical cables on floor. No storage or protection visible.
SBC Code 41-3.3.4 — Flexible cables and cords in separated circuits shall be visible throughout any part of their length liable to mechanical damage.
Priority MEDIUM
MEDIUM VIO-002 SBC Ref: 711:52.101

Mechanical protection for flexible cables in public areas of exhibition

Description Large coiled electrical cables on floor. No storage or protection visible.
SBC Code 711:52.101 — Flexible cables in exhibitions shall not be laid in areas accessible to the public unless protected against mechanical damage.
Priority MEDIUM
MEDIUM VIO-003 SBC Ref: 52-2.6

Mechanical protection on wiring in impact-prone areas

Description Exposed electrical wiring running through ceiling grid. No protective covering visible.
SBC Code 52-2.6 — Wiring systems subject to impact (AG) shall be protected by location or by additional mechanical protection such as conduit, trunking, or armor.
Priority MEDIUM
